title: Sanji Pushes Luffy Away
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Sanji as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji tries to protect the crew by rejecting Luffy, but Luffy refuses to accept a false goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone I met during that time ...they're all my Saviour.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My only wish is to disappear from all of their lives without hurting a single one of them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: My adventure must...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Come to an end here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey... stop with the waterworks already! You're making me feel bad here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: SA... Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I won't let this marriage of ours...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Turn into that kind of hell for you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive me, I... I shouldn't be so pressure- Tuous!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Especially at a time like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course you'd have a grudge against this marriage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I've overstepped my boundaries... my apologies!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ClAP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I mean, I just met you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And there's no way I'd be able to fill the big hole in your heart right now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And besides...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've never even uttered a single word about us marrying...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: But here I am just assuming that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: you... are my only "savior" right now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you really don't mind it being me then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: SANJII!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Tomorrow...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Let's do it... let's get married.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: savior or promise... which will he choose?! Is his adventure really going to end here?!

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 25 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
